THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOHERTY, DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH ST. #406, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-19-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. RENT, DAMAGES & COSTS WAIVED UNLESS DEFT FAILS TO VACATE THEN DEFT TO PAY $1330- RENT + $12.14 PER DAY FROM 7/12/97 + $165- COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.PLTF RETAINS SECUR DEPOSIT.NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION.
